title: Happy Ghast Parking
description: Park your Happy Ghasts to make them stay completely still! A better Happy Ghast mod featuring increased flying speed and mid-air parking (perfect for building)
body:
# Happy Ghast Parking

Have you ever tried to build, mine, or explore while riding a Happy Ghast, only to find it drifting away the moment you dismount? **Happy Ghast Parking** is the ultimate Quality of Life (QoL) mod that allows you to park your mount perfectly still in mid-air! 

Designed for builders and explorers, this mod gives you total control over your Nether companion.

## Mid-Air Parking and Safe Dismounting

Park your Happy Ghast anywhere in the air! Whether you are chopping down trees, mining high walls, or just leaving it in a dedicated parking spot at your base, your mount will stay completely frozen. It will patiently wait for your return exactly where you left it, completely unaffected by gravity or AI wandering. 🛑🏗️

![Mid-Air Parking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sKBTnccc/images/2f6eb283ef79b46cae80f87215ed3df16d5f7131.gif)

![Safe Dismounting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sKBTnccc/images/5707af079a867129d1c6aa49067791f65461115f.gif)

## Dynamic Glowing Colors

When parked, your Happy Ghast will emit a helpful glowing outline so you can easily spot it from a distance. But it's not just a generic glow—it dynamically matches the exact dye color of the harness you have equipped! Collect all 16 colors to fully customize your mount and make it shine in the dark. 🌈✨

![Dynamic Glowing Colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a57379b782a8b9279be9662fe9f077c2274eec4.png)

## Increased Flying Speed

Tired of slow travel? Boost your Happy Ghast's flying speed to zip across the Overworld and the Nether in record time! Perfect for long-distance exploration and quick getaways. 🚀💨

![Increased Flying Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sKBTnccc/images/db26174db3199138583b74c1ac3cfc57c63b4c51.gif)

## Fully Configurable

Take total control of your experience! Use the in-game configuration screen to tailor the mod to your playstyle. You can toggle parked invulnerability (to protect your mount from creepers and skeletons while you are away), visual particles, sound effects, glowing borders, and fine-tune your riding speed multiplier. ⚙️🛠️

![Fully Configurable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50472f3cc7f8f0c34fd3ca92c26650e6f245e43f_0.webp)

## How to Use

* **To Park / Unpark:** `Shift + Right-Click` on your Happy Ghast with an empty main hand. 
* **Quick Unpark:** Simply `Right-Click` to mount a parked Ghast, and it will automatically unpark so you can fly away instantly.
* **Feedback:** You will hear a harness sound and see green particles (if enabled in the config) confirming the Ghast is safely parked.

## Dependencies

To ensure everything works smoothly, make sure you have the following installed:
* Fabric API
* ModMenu
* Cloth Config API
